title: Livekit_voiceAgent
description: Real-time voice AI agent enabling low-latency conversational interactions with LLM integration.

deepDive.architecture: Real-time voice pipeline using LiveKit Agents framework with modular components for STT → LLM → TTS over WebRTC.
deepDive.performance: Achieved low-latency streaming responses with optimized turn detection and real-time audio processing.
deepDive.challenge: Handling real-time synchronization between speech input, model processing, and audio output while minimizing latency.

title: RAG-LLM app using Llama index
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system for context-aware responses from custom document datasets.

deepDive.architecture: Document ingestion → text chunking → embedding generation → FAISS vector storage → similarity-based retrieval → LLM generation.
deepDive.performance: Improved response accuracy and reduced hallucinations via optimized chunk size and embedding strategies.
deepDive.challenge: Tuning chunk sizes and managing embeddings to balance between too much and too little context.

title: Devops-Calci
description: A calculator application demonstrating DevOps practices with containerization and deployment workflows.

deepDive.architecture: Containerized single-service application using Docker, with CI/CD pipeline integration for automated deployment.
deepDive.performance: Improved deployment efficiency by automating build and deployment steps, reducing manual setup time.
deepDive.challenge: Configuring Docker correctly and ensuring smooth CI/CD execution without environment-related issues.
